meta.title: Sevives
meta.description: Sevives is an AI studio in Alicante. We turn AI into systems your team actually ships with. Work in progress — this is the public ~60% build.

banner.wip: Work in progress — public ~60% build. The hardest 40% (the signature polish) is taught on the channel.

home.title: AI your team actually ships with
home.subtitle: We don't sell demos. We build the systems, install them on your own accounts, and hand you the keys. This site is the public ~60% build of how we do it.

carousel.title: Six capabilities, one moving picture
carousel.hint: Drag to spin — a generic, reusable 3D pattern

blueprints.title: Pick the system you need next

mastery.title: AI Mastery
mastery.body: Get your team fluent in AI for daily work — not theory, working habits.

community.title: Network Management & Advertising Campaigns
community.body: Content and campaigns that compound, driven by an AI workflow you own.

visual.title: AI Visual Generation
visual.body: On-brand visuals at production speed, generated and finished in-house.

process.title: Built by us, owned by you

0.title: We build
0.body: The system is engineered in-house, end to end.

1.title: We install
1.body: Deployed on your own accounts — your data, your keys.

2.title: You own
2.body: No Sevives SaaS lock-in, ever. The whole thing is yours.

blueprints.title: Three systems. Pick where you start.
blueprints.subtitle: Each Blueprint is a complete system we build and install on your accounts. This page is a ~60% draft — the final scope is refined with you.

mastery.name: AI Mastery
mastery.body: A hands-on program that turns AI from a curiosity into a daily reflex across your team.
points: Habits that stick after we leave

community.name: Network Management & Advertising Campaigns
community.body: An AI-driven content and community engine — designed once, run by your team.

visual.name: AI Visual Generation
visual.body: Generate and finish visuals in-house, on brand, without the agency turnaround.

blueprints.note: Detailed scope and pricing are intentionally not final here — that's part of the build.

contact.title: Tell us what you want to ship
contact.subtitle: This form is UI only in the public build — it isn't wired to a backend. Use it to see the structure, not to send a real message.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: What do you want to build with AI?
form.wip: Disabled in the public build — no message will be sent.

footer.tagline: AI studio · Alicante. Built by us, owned by you.
footer.wip: Public ~60% build. The signature polish is taught on the channel.
